topic: A person making a peanut butter and jelly sandwich.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Front view of hands selecting two slices of bread.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Close-up of a knife spreading peanut butter across one bread slice.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Top-down view as jelly is spread on the other slice and the sandwich is assembled.
parsed_generation.narration: In eight seconds, the sequence follows a single subject as they build a peanut butter and jelly sandwich. It moves from selecting bread, to spreading peanut butter, to spreading jelly and joining the slices.
